title: Preserve mood dropdown and convert resource tabs to flip-card images with pop artist content

requirements.text: Preserve the 'How are you feeling?' mood dropdown in ConversationInput component exactly as it currently exists - do not remove or modify this dropdown functionality

quotes: Dont remove how you are feeling drop down

acceptanceCriteria: The mood selection dropdown remains visible and functional in ConversationInput
Users can select their emotional state from the dropdown before submitting check-ins
The dropdown UI and behavior is unchanged from the current implementation

requirements.text: Convert the food, music, stories, self-care, and videos resource links to display as clickable image cards instead of text links in the cloud shape layout

quotes: Convert rest of the tabs as images to be clicked

acceptanceCriteria: Each resource category (food, music, stories, self-care, videos) displays as an image card
The images maintain the cloud shape layout arrangement
Cards are visually distinct and clearly indicate they are clickable

requirements.text: Implement flip animation for resource image cards so that when clicked, the card flips to reveal the detailed content (links or descriptions) on the back side

quotes: Once clicked, show the contents there by flipping the image

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a resource card triggers a smooth flip animation
The back of the card displays the relevant links or content for that resource category
Users can flip the card back to return to the front image view
The flip animation is smooth and does not cause layout shifts

requirements.text: Update music recommendations in moodResourceLinks.ts to include popular music and pop artists alongside current recommendations

quotes: For music and videos, use pop artists as well

acceptanceCriteria: Music links include references to popular pop artists
Recommendations span multiple moods (sad, lonely, stressed, etc.)
Links point to accessible music content featuring pop artists

requirements.text: Update video recommendations in moodResourceLinks.ts to include popular music videos and pop artist content alongside current video recommendations

quotes: For music and videos, use pop artists as well

acceptanceCriteria: Video links include music videos from popular pop artists
Recommendations are mood-appropriate and span different emotional states
Links point to accessible video content on platforms like YouTube

requirements.text: Debug and fix the voice conversation functionality so Ana verbally responds to user check-ins using the Web Speech Synthesis API as implemented in useSpeechSynthesis.ts and ResponseDisplay.tsx

quotes: Ana is still not talking or conversing with the user

acceptanceCriteria: When a user submits a check-in, Ana's text response is automatically spoken aloud using speech synthesis
Voice output works for both text and voice input submissions
Speech synthesis properly initializes and plays without errors
Users can hear Ana's voice responses in both guest and authenticated modes

requirements.text: Verify ResponseDisplay.tsx properly triggers speech synthesis when receiving new responses and add detailed error logging to capture any speech synthesis initialization or playback failures

quotes: Ana is still not talking or conversing with the user

acceptanceCriteria: Console logs show when speech synthesis is triggered for each response
Errors related to speech synthesis initialization, voice loading, or playback are captured and logged
The speak function from useSpeechSynthesis is called with the correct response text
Browser compatibility issues with speech synthesis are detected and logged

constraints: Do not modify or remove the existing mood dropdown selector in ConversationInput
Maintain the existing cloud shape layout for resource cards
Preserve all existing authentication and guest mode functionality
Keep the existing useSpeechSynthesis hook implementation
Do not change backend response generation logic
nonGoals: Creating new mood categories or emotional states
Modifying the chat history display format
Changing the backend response generation system
Altering the authentication flow or Internet Identity integration
Adding new resource categories beyond the existing five (food, music, stories, self-care, videos)

required: Colorful food plate illustration for mood-based recipe recommendations icon (food-mood-card.dim_200x200.png)
Music notes and headphones illustration for mood-based music recommendations icon (music-mood-card.dim_200x200.png)
Open book with stars illustration for mood-based story recommendations icon (stories-mood-card.dim_200x200.png)
Spa and wellness items illustration for mood-based self-care routines icon (selfcare-mood-card.dim_200x200.png)
Play button and screen illustration for mood-based video recommendations icon (videos-mood-card.dim_200x200.png)
